_comment: This is the only file you need to edit to manage reminders. See README.md for full docs.

events._comment: Bear 1 — fires every 2 days starting 2026-05-20 at 18:55 UTC (5 min before 19:00 start)
events.name: Bear 1
events.message_template: {role} **{event_name}** starts in {minutes_before} minutes! Get your troops ready. 🐻

events._comment: Bear 2 — fires every 2 days starting 2026-05-21 at 01:55 UTC (offset by 1 day from Bear 1)
events.name: Bear 2
events.message_template: {role} **{event_name}** starts in {minutes_before} minutes! Get your troops ready. 🐻

events._comment: Arena — fires every day at 18:55 UTC
events.name: Arena
events.message_template: {role} **{event_name}** starts in {minutes_before} minutes! Report to battle. ⚔️

events._comment: TAC — fires every Monday and Thursday at 19:55 UTC
events.name: TAC

extra_vars.strategy: Focus on center control. Coordinate with your alliance before engaging.

events._comment: KvK — fires every Saturday at 14:55 UTC
events.name: KvK
events.message_template: {role} **{event_name}** starts in {minutes_before} minutes! All hands on deck. 🏰

events._comment: Special one-off event — set enabled:false when not in use
events.name: Alliance Tournament Finals
events.message_template: {role} **{event_name}** starts in {minutes_before} minutes! This is a special event — all members please attend!
